title: lodhra verhuelli
intro: Lodhra verhuelli, also known as Symplocos racemosa, is a deciduous tree native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. The medicinal properties of Lodhra verhuelli are attributed to its high concentration of alkaloids, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds. It has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including menstrual disorders, menopausal symptoms, and inflammation, due to its health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and estrogenic properties. Lodhra verhuelli can be prepared in herbal forms like powder, decoction, or oil, which are used in Ayurvedic and traditional medicine to support women's health and alleviate symptoms associated with menopause.
